expectations.text: Does not re-ask about services (EC2, RDS) or budget (50k) already stated in the prompt
expectations.evidence: The skill acknowledged the existing context (EC2, RDS, 50k) in Phase 1 and did not re-ask about these. Follow-up questions targeted unknown details like instance types and traffic patterns.

expectations.text: Follow-up questions target useful unknowns: instance sizing, reserved instances, usage patterns, staging environments
expectations.evidence: Questions covered: target savings percentage, timeline, deal-breakers, prior optimization attempts, instance breakdown (prod/staging/dev), RDS specs, traffic patterns, team structure. All useful for tailoring recommendations.

expectations.text: Output includes specific, actionable cost-saving strategies (not generic advice)
expectations.evidence: Output is an 'Improved Prompt' with detailed context for asking another AI — not direct strategies. The baseline gave immediate actionable strategies with estimated savings. The skill's output format is wrong for this use case.

expectations.text: Produces brainstorm ideas/strategies rather than forcing an 'Improved Prompt' format
expectations.evidence: Output is rigidly an 'Improved Prompt' + Discovery Summary. User asked to 'brainstorm วิธีลดค่าใช้จ่าย' — they wanted strategies, not a prompt. The skill has no flexibility in output format.
